title: Phase 22.1 — Content Click Fix Log
note: Primary candidate (blog/20000-loan) fixed in Phase 22, now in cooldown until Jun 26. These 3 are the next highest-priority real pages not in cooldown.

pages_fixed.query: should i pay off debt or invest calculator
pages_fixed.reason: Position dropped from 16.3 to 52 — needs authority reinforcement. Strong intent match with high-value content.
pages_fixed.cooldown: READY — only links added, no content changed
pages_fixed.fix_applied: INTERNAL_LINKS_ONLY — linked from loan-calculator and investment-return calculator via calculator-decision-links. Content already strong (short answer, comparison table, alternatives, risks).
pages_fixed.note: Content quality is high. Deep position is an authority problem, not a content problem. Internal links from indexed pages help but don't fix systemic authority gap.

pages_fixed.reason: Highest query volume among deep-position calculators. Needs cross-links and authority transfer.
pages_fixed.fix_applied: CROSS_LINKS — linked from retirement-planning, compound-interest calculators. Connected to decision pages (401k-vs-taxable-investing, pay-off-student-loans-or-invest) via contextual linking system.
pages_fixed.note: Calculator has rich content (formula, example, keyFactors, tips, takeaways). Deep position is authority gap.

pages_fixed.reason: Highest total impressions. Multiple diverse queries. Deep position suggests authority gap, not content gap.
pages_fixed.fix_applied: CROSS_LINKS — linked from geo page (philadelphia-pa), connected to decision pages (what-tax-bracket-am-i-in). Added reciprocal links to related guide pages.
pages_fixed.note: Calculator has rich content. Position 87.6 means it's indexed but heavily penalized by low domain authority. Backlinks are the systemic fix.

key_insight: All 3 high-value real pages have GOOD content. Their deep positions (52-88) point to a systemic site authority gap, not content quality issues. Internal links and cross-links help crawl but won't dramatically improve rankings. The systemic fix is backlinks.
